Crown Defense

The King loves to sit in his tower and drink tea, but funny red enemies are coming to bother him. In Crown Defense, your job is to protect the King and his tower. If you lose a few times, do not worry. Every time you play, you can earn coins and use them to make your tower stronger.

Play Crown Defense Online

Loading game...
About Crown Defense

The King loves to sit in his tower and drink tea, but funny red enemies are coming to bother him. In Crown Defense, your job is to protect the King and his tower. If you lose a few times, do not worry. Every time you play, you can earn coins and use them to make your tower stronger. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Crown Defense in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Strategy game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Crown Defense for free?

Yes. Crown Defense is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Crown Defense?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
